Banner.heading: Professional Crop Disease Detection with 98% Accuracy
Banner.pera: Specialized AI platform for identifying 200+ plant diseases and pests. Get instant diagnosis and treatment recommendations from professional-grade diagnostic technology.

Mystery.heading: The mystery of Agric.ai solved
Mystery.pera: Agric.ai brings extensive data on crops and diseases, advanced identification tools, and comprehensive information for farmers for innovative and advanced farming.

cards.title: Automatically Detect Disease
cards.description: From powdery mildew to bud rot, mosaic and more, Agric.ai finds them all... automatically!

cards.title: Reduce Scouting Time
cards.description: Why waste your time finding problems when you can instead be solving them?

cards.title: Reduce Crop Loss
cards.description: Don't let a good plant go to waste! Increase your yield with Agric.ai automated scouting.
